blocks.text: Match preview: Scotland Women face Ireland Women in 2nd Match, Group A (T20) on Sat, 13 Jun, 2026, 3:00 pm at Emirates Old Trafford Manchester. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Classic English seaming conditions when clouds cover; batting paradise in sunshine.
Light drizzle · High 16°C / Low 12°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 24 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
